overall.description: First-person view from a ship's bridge during a nighttime storm, showing navigation displays and the bow cutting through dark waters. A lightning flash briefly illuminates the scene around the 10-second mark. This is game engine footage from a maritime simulation.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station with forward view

events.description: Bright lightning flash illuminates the ship's bow and surrounding ocean waters

agents.ego_description: Navigating the vessel through stormy nighttime conditions while monitoring the radar and navigation charts

entered.detail: Colorful nautical chart display showing coastal topography and vessel position
Circular radar screen with rotating sweep showing surrounding contacts and landmasses
Blue depth finder display showing underwater topography
Forward deck of the ship with railings and anchor equipment visible through the window
Metal framing of the bridge windows with horizontal safety bars

segments.scene_description: The ship's bridge interior with three active navigation screens displaying charts, radar, and sonar data. The vessel moves steadily through dark stormy waters, with the bow visible through the forward windows. A sudden lightning flash briefly illuminates the exterior scene around the 10-second mark, revealing the choppy sea surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station with forward view

agents.ego_description: Maintaining course through the storm while monitoring navigation systems

segments.scene_description: Continued transit through the stormy night from the bridge perspective. The navigation screens remain active with the radar continuously rotating, and the ship maintains steady forward motion through the rough seas with no further significant weather events.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dark, turbulent nighttime storm. It begins inside the bridge, where three active navigation screens display rotating radar, sonar, and chart data while the bow cuts through choppy waters. As the vessel pushes forward, a sudden flash of lightning momentarily illuminates the exterior, revealing the violent texture of the sea surface against the darkness. The scene then settles back into a steady transit, with the glowing displays remaining the primary light source as the ship maintains its course through the rough, stormy night.
